title: Drift says $280M exploit tied to 'sophisticated' admin takeover; ZachXBT criticizes Circle over USDC handling
message_html: Drift says $280M exploit tied to 'sophisticated' admin takeover; ZachXBT criticizes Circle over USDC handling ...
snippet: Drift said Wednesday's $280 million exploit was a result of unauthorized transaction approvals, facilitated through durable nonce mechanisms.
